user.title: Publish Narodmon
user.description: Publish Home Assistant sensor readings to [Narodmon](https://narodmon.ru).

data_description.device_mac: MAC address of your Narodmon device, e.g. AA:BB:CC:DD:EE:FF
data_description.device_name: Display name on the Narodmon map
data_description.coordinates_entity: Entity with latitude and longitude attributes (e.g. zone.home, person)
data_description.sensors: Sensor entities whose values will be sent to Narodmon
data_description.send_interval_changed: Minimum delay before sending after sensor values change (default: 360)
data_description.send_interval_force: Maximum time between sends even if nothing changed (default: 1200)

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Publish Narodmon
reconfigure.description: Update sensors and send intervals for this Narodmon device.

error.entity_not_found: One or more selected entities were not found.
error.mac_change_not_allowed: MAC address cannot be changed. Remove the entry and add it again.
error.invalid_intervals: Force send interval must be greater than the change send interval.

abort.already_configured: A device with this MAC address is already configured.
